title: drosera anglica var. linglica
intro: Drosera anglica var. linglica, commonly known as the English sundew, is a carnivorous plant belonging to the Droseraceae family. It is native to the UK and has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's leaves and stems contain compounds such as iridoids and flavonoids, which have been shown to have health benefits, including antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Drosera anglica var. linglica can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or syrup, and is often used in herbal remedies to treat digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions.
